text:
Taragetter (タラゲッテ, Taragette) was a Chimera Ant Peon Soldier that worked under Welfin. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 251 

Appearance

Taragetter was a tall Chimera Ant with a lean build and body structure similar to other Chimera Ant soldiers. He had darker-colored forewings that reach down to the small of his back. His face was oblong and vaguely boxy, with huge, round eyes at either side of his head and bulbous lips. His bottom lip was connected to the base of his throat through a canula-like apparatus. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Amidst patrolling the Royal Palace of East Gorteau, Taragetter encounters Knov, whose intention is to infiltrate the palace to create portals connecting to the outside for the Chimera Ant Extermination Team. Taragetter's head is immediately removed by Knov's Nen ability Scream, killing him instantly. 

Scouring the royal palace to locate a missing woman for Bizeff, Welfin encounters a pool of Taragetter's residue blood along with a muddy pair of shoes. He quickly deduces that the muddy shoes are from the rainstorm they had a week before, around the same time Taragetter had disappeared. Contemplating two likely scenarios, Welfin believes that Taragetter was either killed or abducted by the intruder, though the latter seems unlikely due to him leaving behind his muddy shoes. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 25, Chapter 261 

Taragetter is indirectly mentioned by Welfin when he lies to Bizeff about an intruder who plans to blow up the palace. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 25, Chapter 262 

Abilities & Powers

As a Chimera Ant, Taragetter is stronger than the average human.
